pairs.py:
def count_abs_above(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose absolute value exceeds the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if abs(v) > k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def sum_unblocked(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum values along paths from start, pruning any blocked node and its subtree."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; blocked = spec["blocked"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; total = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if blocked[n]: continue
        total += vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return total

def sorted_label_csv(spec: dict) -> str:
    """Collect the names of all nodes reachable from start, comma-joined in sorted order."""
    adj = spec["adj"]
    seen = set()
    stack = [spec["start"]]
    found = []
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(n)
        found.append(n)
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return ",".join(sorted(found))

def leaf_share_percent(spec: dict) -> str:
    """Percent of total reachable value held at leaf nodes."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = []
    queue = [start]
    while queue:
        n = queue.pop(0)
        if n in seen:
            continue
        seen.append(n)
        queue.extend(adj[n])
    total = 0
    leaf = 0
    for n in seen:
        total += vals[n]
        if not adj[n]:
            leaf += vals[n]
    return str(round(100.0 * leaf / total, 1)) + "%"
